title: Junior Business Development Manager at Vestian

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Vestian
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Vestian in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vestian:
Vestian is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vestian!
